summary: Soundboard capture of a fiery ’70s set that smokes from start to finish, driven by an explosive Other One and a scorching GDTRFB solo.
review: The show is consistently praised for its high‑energy second set, with The Other One hailed as a “sonic assassin” bass showcase and the GDTRFB solo described as raw, hot and goose‑bump inducing. The soundboard source is generally clear, though a few listeners note that the mix improves after about eight minutes and the final NFA fades out early.

ai_rating.rationale: All seven reviews are overwhelmingly positive (average 4.9 stars) and focus on stellar musical moments; recording comments note only minor mix quirks, resulting in a high combined rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Overall clear soundboard capture; mix gets noticeably better after ~8 min, last NFA cuts out early but does not detract from overall enjoyment.

standout_songs: Going Down the Road Feeling Bad
show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers describe the concert as smoking from start to finish, with a particularly powerful second set that builds momentum and maintains high energy throughout.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His GDTRFB solo is called “exquisite & raw” and “goes berserk”, delivering goose‑bumps; even when he forgets lyrics on Stella Blue his playing remains strong.
band_member_comments.Phil: Praised as a “true sonic‑assassin” with a nonstop, destructive bass solo during The Other One that drives the jam to epic heights.
